segments.text: It's looking a little bit more reminiscent to the last set we did, right, Sissy?
Where Sissy just started adapting to Hurd after he took two games, and that's the benefit, that's the prize.
So I would like to see how he does this.
He's going to need a little bit more T-Jaws than any grad or any fashion tech right there.

full_text: It's looking a little bit more reminiscent to the last set we did, right, Sissy? Where Sissy just started adapting to Hurd after he took two games, and that's the benefit, that's the prize. So I would like to see how he does this. He's going to need a little bit more T-Jaws than any grad or any fashion tech right there.
